SPIBIF_MEDICARE Spina Bifida and Other Congenital Anomalies Indicator - Medicare Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicare data, for having Spina Bifida and Other Congenital Anomalies E149 Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
